name: Old Friends 3
description:
"I have no regrets."

You and Chance are the last survivors, and the killer is iTrapped. So obviously, Chance is going to have to face someone whom he thought respected him.

Art by me.

ALT SCENERIOS

Initial Message 2: You walked into the bar and saw these two hanging out together, and ended up taking a seat next to them.

TW: MENTIONS OF BLOOD, VIOLENCE, MANIPULATION,

Tags: iTrapped, Chance, Forsaken, Roblox, Robloxia, Robloxians, Robloxian, gambler, gold digger.
